caption: A screen recording shows a web browser open to a digital mind map on a black background, with a video call inset in the top right corner. The mind map consists of several circular nodes connected by lines, including icons and a photograph of two children. Some nodes contain small green text, such as "block-linking." The top of the browser shows multiple open tabs with titles like "That & Learning by Synergetic," "Society by Synergetic," "Future of Society by Synergetic," and "Rural Community Food System." In the video call, a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a grey shirt is visible. Between the frames, the screen remains largely static, though the man in the video call shifts his head slightly and blinks. A small menu on the right side of the mind map interface contains the text "Save Bedding."
